name: Step by step, what's next after hurting my hand on the job in Millcreek?
description: Notify boss, authorized doctor, file Form 122, comply with care.[1][2]

mainEntity.name: Step by step, what's next after hurting my hand on the job in Millcreek?

acceptedAnswer.text: Notify boss, authorized doctor, file Form 122, comply with care.[1][2]
acceptedAnswer.description: 1. Notify supervisor ASAP verbally/writing. 2. See authorized doctor. 3. File/confirm Form 122. 4. Follow treatment.[1][2] Process starts with carrier review; benefits for medical/wages if accepted.[1] Key factors: no proof of fault needed for comp; third-party suits separate. Keep records of everything.[2] Avoid refusing light duty or exams to prevent denial.[2]
